description: touched fires on bind:value change (§55.7). Typing into #name flips signup.name.touched true; the un-interacted agree field stays touched false, and submitted stays false (interacting a field does NOT submit the form).
rationale: §55.7 touched becomes true on first interaction — a bind:value change is one of the three triggers. It is PER-FIELD: only the field that changed becomes touched. submitted is orthogonal (compound-level, submit-only).
